name: Mango Upside Down Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour lemon juice over mangos and let stand for 15 minutes.
2. Melt 1 tablespoon margarine in an 8-inch cake pan or casserole dish (avoid using an iron skillet as the mangos will darken).
3. Add brown sugar and cover with mango slices.
4. To prepare the cake batter, cream the margarine; add sugar and continue to cream until light and fluffy. Add beaten egg.
5. Sift together dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, and salt) and add them alternately with milk to the butter mixture, mixing gently after each addition.
6. Pour the batter over the mango layer in the pan.
7. Bake for 50 to 60 minutes at 375°F until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. When the cake is done, carefully turn it upside down onto a serving plate and serve warm.
